items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of group size changes after booking.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a scenario where the group size changes after booking, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this specific behavior is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case and prior steps do not provide concrete evidence of how the system handles changes in group size post-booking, leading to an inconclusive status. Therefore, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed.
